summary: Tested redesigned Billing & Reconciliation module. All 10 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI fully functional with Month/Year selector, 5 summary cards, expandable settlements by account, grand total row, existing note message, and Debit/Credit Notes table.
seed_data_creation: None - tested with existing data (3 settlements for March 2026)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Billing & Reconciliation module redesigned and working. New workflow: Settlements (per Account) → Monthly Reconciliation (all accounts combined) → Debit/Credit Note generation. Test distributor 99fb55dc-532c-4e85-b618-6b8a5e552c04 has 3 settlements for March 2026 with total adjustment +₹865.81. Credit Note CN-2026-0001 already generated for ₹165.81 (when only 2 settlements existed).

backend.details: Returns all settlements for March 2026 grouped by account with totals and existing note info
Generates Debit/Credit Note for month. Validates: auth required, month/year required, no settlements error, duplicate note prevention
Lists all debit/credit notes for distributor
Lists all settlements with month/year filtering

frontend.details: Dropdown selectors for Month (January-December) and Year (2024-2026) with Refresh button
Total Accounts (2), Total Billing Value (₹59,300.00), Distributor Earnings (₹1,482.50), Margin at Transfer (₹616.69), Net Adjustment (+₹865.81 Credit Note)
Groups settlements by account with expandable details. Shows: Empire Restaurant (1 settlement), Lead Seventeen Test (2 settlements)
Clicking account row expands to show individual settlements with Settlement #, Deliveries, Billing Value, Earnings, Margin at Transfer, Adjustment, Status
Shows totals: 2 accounts, 3 settlements - Billing ₹59,300.00, Earnings ₹1,482.50, Net Adjustment +₹865.81
Shows 'Credit Note already generated for this month: CN-2026-0001' when note exists
Shows CN-2026-0001: March 2026, Credit Note, ₹165.81, Paid status, with View and Delete actions
Shows 'No settlements found for January 2026' with guidance to generate settlements first
Info card with 'Go to Margins Tab' button for configuring base prices and margins

note_on_data_discrepancy: The existing Credit Note CN-2026-0001 was generated for ₹165.81 when only 2 settlements existed. A third settlement (STL-2026-0003 for Empire Restaurant with +₹700.00) was added later, making the current total adjustment ₹865.81. This is expected behavior - the note captures the state at generation time.
